column1: #   input     a SPACE-separated list of typed scalar/range args:
#               scalars: empty | n:<f64> | t:<text> | b:TRUE|b:FALSE | e:<#TOKEN!>
#                        ','-split, each a typed scalar) — first_error must
#                        IGNORE values inside a range (COUNT semantics).
#               e:<#TOKEN!>  -> Some(error)   (first scalar error, left to right)
# first_error scans SCALARS ONLY; ranges never propagate here.
